policy: FAOS multi-tenant RBAC — Executive Alpha (CEO), Team Leads, External B2B Clients, plus department roles.

executive_alpha.label: Executive Alpha / CEO (Fahim Mahmud Khan)
executive_alpha.access: Full system control & TAC approval gateways

owner.label: Executive Alpha / CEO
owner.description: Full system control — TAC approval gateways, JARVIS, finance, HR, all private data (Fahim Mahmud Khan)

executive.label: Executive Alpha (alias)
executive.description: Same as owner — full control & TAC gateways

manager.label: Operations Manager / Team Lead
manager.description: TAC, projects, agents, CRM, inventory, orders — no executive finance/HR

team_lead.label: Department Team Lead
team_lead.description: Create Pillar, Media/Creative, Service modules — department agent scope

sales.label: Sales Team
sales.description: Clients, projects, and orders — no invoices, HR, or TAC executive

finance.label: Finance Team
finance.description: Invoicing, inventory, orders, and products — no HR personal records or JARVIS

hr.label: HR Team
hr.description: HR module only — isolated people data

creative.label: Creative / Media Team
creative.description: Creative studio, AI SEO/GEO, and agent workflow — no client financial data

client.label: External B2B Client (RR Wigs Portal)
client.description: Isolated tenant portal only — no agency revenue, other clients, FMK margins, or JARVIS brain
